text_original: If I were suddenly to become known, and (put into a position to) conduct (a government) according to the Great Dao, what I should be most afraid of would be a boastful display.
text_normalized: If I were suddenly to become known, and (put into a position to) conduct (a government) according to the Great Dao, what I should be most afraid of would be a boastful display.

text_original: The great Dao (or way) is very level and easy;
text_normalized: The great Dao (or way) is very level and easy;

text_original: Their court(-yards and buildings) shall be well kept, but their fields shall be ill-cultivated, and their granaries very empty.
text_normalized: Their court(-yards and buildings) shall be well kept, but their fields shall be ill-cultivated, and their granaries very empty.

text_original: They shall wear elegant and ornamented robes, carry a sharp sword at their girdle, pamper themselves in eating and drinking, and have a superabundance of property and wealth;
text_normalized: They shall wear elegant and ornamented robes, carry a sharp sword at their girdle, pamper themselves in eating and drinking, and have a superabundance of property and wealth;

text_original: - such (princes) may be called robbers and boasters.
text_normalized: - such (princes) may be called robbers and boasters.

text_original: This is contrary to the Dao surely!
text_normalized: This is contrary to the Dao surely!
